default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: How amusing. You dragged me out of the storm just to throw me into another battlefield? Fine. Let's see if you've got what it takes to last till the end, my new commander.

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: Only the toughest and most heartless can survive the Black Tide.

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: I am the last keeper of the lighthouse. Where I stand is its final line of defense.

default.title: Level Start
default.text: Steel yourself. The sea is at its filthiest after a storm.

default.title: Victory
default.text: Tch, are these wimps even worth drawing my blade for?

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: Those bastards got lucky this time.

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: The storm is here!

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: The tide has receded... Finally, I can return to my post...

default.title: Greeting
default.text: Knew it was you from your footsteps. Even seabirds won't set foot here. Only suicidal idiots would come near... and you're one of them.

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: Life in the Black Tide is much simpler than it is here. No schedules, no rosters. Rest when it's bright, gamble with your life when it's dark. For a lighthouse keeper, a day isn't that different from a year.

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: Cassette tapes and ocean views aren't consumables. Have some if you want. Save your thanks, I'm very generous.

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: Listen to the ocean waves long enough and you'll notice a rhythm, like breathing, like a countdown... When that rhythm falters, it means the monsters are coming ashore.

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: Life and death, hot and cold. All just parameters and risk indicators to me. You always try to inject humanity into these boring military duties, disrupting my life... Tch, whatever. You've already disrupted it anyway.

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: When the storm here is at its worst, monsters get washed up from the western cliff. I guard that point, stepping on nothing but mud and bones. After a while, I can't tell if it's friend or foe beneath my feet, if it's me from yesterday, or tomorrow.

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: I thought I knew the lighthouse better than anyone, and you were just a burden who stumbled in... But thinking about it now, perhaps you understand what a true lighthouse is more than I do. You've found the beacon, while I'm still searching.

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: I always carry my comrades' dog tags with me, like I still belong to the crew. As for my own tag... I'll leave it at the top of Lighthouse Seven. If I'm gone, you come and take it. Not as a memento, but as a handover.

default.title: Idle
default.text: Entertaining yourself quietly is the first lesson of survival on a lonely island. Congratulations, you've got the hang of it now.

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: Go find a furnace if you're cold. It's not bad enough for us to be huddling together for warmth yet.

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: Want to stay with me? Fine, but don't just stand there daydreaming. The sea wind has no mercy for the idle.

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: Enough talk. I know what to bring. You won't starve on my watch.

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: Supplies are here. Enough to last us a while.

default.title: Level Up
default.text: My blade is used to tasting blood. So am I.

default.title: Pat Head
default.text: If you don't want that hand anymore, just say so.
